[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-10-13
[TITLE]: 15-Yr-Old Munira Abdifatah Abdi Wins Ksh2 Million in Quran Recitation Champ. in Dubai | The Muslim Voice, Nigeria
[METADATA/INTRO]: A student from Eastleigh, Kenya named Munira Abdifatah Abdi Farah wins Ksh2 million in the 2022 Quran recitation competition in Dubai. Out of 300 contestants from around the world, she placed among the top 10. Munira, 15, of Kenya is...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: A student from Eastleigh, Kenya named Munira Abdifatah Abdi Farah wins Ksh2 million in the 2022 Quran recitation competition in Dubai. Out of 300 contestants from around the world, she placed among the top 10. 
 Munira, 15, of Kenya is the 2022 World Quran Recitation Champion after placing eighth in the Dubai-based World Competition. After triumphing in a matchup both locally and at the East and Central Africa Competition held in Rwanda in July, she represented Kenya in the yearly competition. 
 “I am grateful that I finished among the top 10 competitors in Quran recitation in Dubai from a pool of 300 competitors across the world,” she said.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-10-12
[TITLE]: Kenyan Girl Wins KSh 2 Million in World Quran Recitation Competition in Dubai - Tuko.co.ke
[METADATA/INTRO]: Kenyan Girl Wins KSh 2 Million in World Quran Recitation Competition in Dubai - Munira Abdifatah Abdi, a student based in Eastleigh, scooped KSh 2 million after emerging top ten in the 2022 Quran recitation championship held in Dubai...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Kenyan Girl Wins KSh 2 Million in World Quran Recitation Competition in Dubai 
 - Munira Abdifatah Abdi, a student based in Eastleigh, scooped KSh 2 million after emerging top ten in the 2022 Quran recitation championship held in Dubai 
 - The 15-year-old finished eighth from a pool of 300 competitors across the world- an astounding feat for the 15-year-old to achieve 
 - The competition brought together thousands of students across different countries to test their prowess in reciting sections of the Islamic holy book 
 A 15-year-old girl has put Kenya o the global map after becoming Kenya's 2022 Quran recitation champion after she emerged eighth in the World Competition held in Dubai.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Aug 26, 2021
[TITLE]: Tibyan Center For Quranic Sciences
[METADATA/INTRO]: 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition 
 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition 
 - Aug 26, 2021 
 - Thursday, 02:00 PM 
 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition 
 On behalf of Tibyan Center, we would like to congratulate all of our students who participated in the 2021 Imam Shatibi Qur’an Competition, especially the 7 winners we had in 3 different categories: 10 Qiraat (5 Juz), 30 Juz Girls, and 30 Juz Boys. We especially want to highlight the first place winner for the 30 Juz Girls Category, Sabirin Hassan, who also won a 2021 Toyota Highlander. All Praise is to Allah firstly and then to the sheikh of Markaz Tibyan, Sheikh Abdinasir Farah, as well as Sheikh Dr. Waleed bin Edrees Al-Meneesey. May Allah bless all the winners and participants! 10 Qiraat 1st Place: Abdullahi Bashir Abdi 10 Qiraat 2nd Place: Rahma Kassim Mohamed 10 Qiraat 3rd Place: Abdikhaliq Mohamed Hussein 30 Juz Boys 2nd Place (Tied): Cabdimajid Ismail 30 Juz Boys 2nd Place (Tied): Mohamedamin Hassan 30 Juz Girls 1st Place: Sabirin Hassan 30 Juz Girls 3rd Place: Ilhan Abdi
